title: Programming Basics Quiz
description: A sample quiz covering fundamental programming and software engineering concepts.

questions.text: Which of the following is a loop structure in most programming languages?
Which language is most commonly used for styling web pages?
In software engineering, what is a 'bug'?
options: An error or defect in code

questions.text: What is the primary purpose of unit tests?
options: Verify a small piece of code works correctly

questions.text: Which term describes reusable code that performs a specific task?
Which database query language is used to read and manipulate relational data?
What is the main benefit of using version control?
In web development, what is a 'shared URL'?
options: A link that can be shared for direct quiz access
